title: Trailier Tales | Mossy's Better Dirt Compat
description: A small resourcepack that makes Trailier Tales compatible with Mossy's Better Dirt.
body:
This small resourcepack makes Trailier Tales compatible with the resourcepack "Mossy's Better Dirt".

**Special thanks to:**

- @pixelmossy for making **Mossy's Better Dirt**.
- The Trailier Tales team for the **Trailier Tales** mod.

**Links:**

- Original resourcepack:
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mossys-better-dirt
- Download Trailier Tales:
https://modrinth.com/mod/trailier-tales
